headline: After-School Animal Clubs for Hawaii Schools
subhead: Aloha Critter Club partners with Hawaii Island schools to run after-school clubs where kids become animal experts, practice social-emotional learning, and take meaningful action for animals in their community.
what_we_do_p1: Every week, kids at partner schools across Hawaii Island gather for after-school clubs centered on animal welfare: caring for critters, learning about local wildlife, practicing empathy, and taking on community projects for shelters and rescues.
what_we_do_p2: Our curriculum pairs hands-on animal education with social-emotional learning — building kids who can name what they feel, listen to others, and follow through on what they care about.
